case_title: ROBERT H CHAN VS. ACCELERATED FUNDING AND REALTY, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, ROBERT H RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACCELERATED FUNDING AND REALTY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $23,325.11 PRINCIPAL, $320.00 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,945.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, ROBERT H AS TO DEFENDANT ACCELERATED FUNDING AND REALTY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
